query: Gemini in Chrome availability countries list 2026
a_issues: Neither result includes the 172-country total figure or the specific full list of countries mentioned in the anchor (e.g., from TechOutlook/PiunikaWeb). reasoning: Both content sets cover the same core rollout timeline (US January launch; Canada/India/New Zealand in March; 7 APAC countries in April; Latin America/Africa/Middle East expansion in June) using overlapping sources (workspaceupdates.googleblog.com, techcrunch, 9to5google, blog.google). Neither set contains the specific 172-country total or a complete enumerated list found in the anchor's PiunikaWeb/TechOutlook sources, so both are similarly incomplete for a fully precise answer. Content B adds a source with an unverified claim (remio.ai) that could introduce a minor inaccuracy, while Content A's extra sources are largely duplicative without adding new verified facts. Overall, both provide a similar level of accurate, non-contradictory partial information, making them roughly equivalent in enabling a correct answer, though both fall short of the full 172-country detail in the anchor.
